name: workflow-plugin-namecheap
description: Namecheap DNS provider for workflow IaC (infra.dns)
author: GoCodeAlone

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_API_USER
required_secrets.description: Namecheap account username (also the ApiUser per Namecheap API)

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY
required_secrets.description: Namecheap API key (rotate via Profile → Tools → Namecheap API Access)

required_secrets.name: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP
required_secrets.description: Public IP of the wfctl runner, whitelisted at api.namecheap.com
required_secrets.prompt: Public IP to whitelist (CIDR not supported)
